---
title: "fr_besgsdag_9"
subtitle: "`fr_besgsdag_9`"
description: "fr_besgsdag_9"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fr_besgsdag_9/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                             |
|---------------------|------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`             | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                      |
| `center`            | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                   |
| `sens_ready_wfv9`   | sens_ready_wfv9              | string | Zip bag with SENS activity tracker etc ready. Workflow. Visit 9.                        |
| `sens_sign_in_wfv9` | sens_sign_in_wfv9            | string | Indicates if the participant with is signed in in the SENS webapp. Workflow. Visit 9.   |
| `cgm_ready_wfv9`    | cgm_ready_wfv9               | string | CGM charged and ready. Workflow. Visit 9.                                               |
| `gcm_zip_wfv9`      | gcm_zip_wfv9                 | string | Whether the particpiant has received a zip bag for the return of the CGM. Workflow. V9. |

: Fields in the `fr_besgsdag_9` resource.
